client.workflow: offscreen PyQGIS PostgreSQL provider: open layer, fields, CRS, feature count, extent, first feature

normalization.:relation_oid: installation-local pg_class OID excluded from equality
normalization.:geometry_type_oid: installation-local PostGIS geometry OID excluded from equality
normalization.:index_oid: installation-local pg_class OID excluded from equality

queries.sql: SELECT postgis_version()
SELECT postgis_geos_version(), postgis_proj_version()

SELECT has_schema_privilege(n.oid, 'usage') AND has_table_privilege(t.oid, 'select') AND has_table_privilege(l.oid, 'select') FROM pg_namespace n, pg_class t, pg_class l WHERE n.nspname = 'topology' AND t.relnamespace = n.oid AND l.relnamespace = n.oid AND t.relname = 'topology' AND l.relname = 'layer'

SELECT has_table_privilege(c.oid, 'select') AND has_table_privilege(f.oid, 'select') FROM pg_class c, pg_class f, pg_namespace n, pg_extension e WHERE c.relnamespace = n.oid AND c.relname = 'pointcloud_columns' AND f.relnamespace = n.oid AND f.relname = 'pointcloud_formats' AND n.oid = e.extnamespace AND e.extname = 'pointcloud'

SELECT has_table_privilege(c.oid, 'select') FROM pg_class c, pg_namespace n, pg_type t WHERE c.relnamespace = n.oid AND n.oid = t.typnamespace AND c.relname = 'raster_columns' AND t.typname = 'raster'
SET extra_float_digits=3; SET application_name=' external'; SET datestyle='ISO'; SET client_min_messages TO error

SELECT has_table_privilege('"public"."trace_qgis"','SELECT'), pg_is_in_recovery(), current_schema(), has_any_column_privilege('"public"."trace_qgis"','INSERT'), has_table_privilege('"public"."trace_qgis"','DELETE'), has_any_column_privilege('"public"."trace_qgis"','UPDATE'), has_column_privilege('"public"."trace_qgis"','geom','UPDATE')
SELECT 1 FROM pg_class, pg_namespace WHERE pg_class.relnamespace = pg_namespace.oid AND pg_has_role(relowner,'MEMBER') AND relname = 'trace_qgis' AND nspname = 'public'
SELECT upper(type), srid, coord_dimension FROM geometry_columns WHERE f_table_name = 'trace_qgis' AND f_geometry_column = 'geom' AND f_table_schema = 'public'
SELECT table_schema FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'qgis_layer_metadata'
SELECT description FROM pg_description WHERE objoid = regclass('"public"."trace_qgis"')::oid AND objsubid = 0
SELECT * FROM "public"."trace_qgis" LIMIT 0

SELECT attrelid, attnum, pg_catalog.format_type(atttypid,atttypmod), pg_catalog.col_description(attrelid,attnum), pg_catalog.pg_get_expr(adbin,adrelid), atttypid, attnotnull::int, indisunique::int, attidentity, attgenerated FROM pg_attribute LEFT OUTER JOIN pg_attrdef ON attrelid = adrelid AND attnum = adnum LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT indrelid, indkey, indisunique FROM pg_index WHERE indisunique) uniq ON attrelid = indrelid AND attnum::text = indkey::text WHERE attrelid IN (:relation_oid)
SELECT oid, typname, typtype, typelem, typlen FROM pg_type WHERE oid IN (20, 29, 28, 25, :geometry_type_oid, 27, 26)
SELECT pg_get_serial_sequence('"public"."trace_qgis"', 'id')
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT oid FROM pg_catalog.pg_class WHERE relname = 'qgis_editor_widget_styles')
SELECT count(*) FROM pg_inherits WHERE inhparent = '"public"."trace_qgis"'::regclass
SELECT indexrelid FROM pg_index WHERE indrelid = '"public"."trace_qgis"'::regclass AND (indisprimary OR indisunique) ORDER BY CASE WHEN indisprimary THEN 1 ELSE 2 END LIMIT 1
SELECT attname, attnotnull FROM pg_index, pg_attribute WHERE indexrelid = :index_oid AND indrelid = attrelid AND pg_attribute.attnum = any(pg_index.indkey)
SELECT auth_name, auth_srid, srtext, proj4text FROM spatial_ref_sys WHERE srid = 4326
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT oid FROM pg_catalog.pg_class WHERE relname = 'layer_styles')
SELECT count(*) FROM "public"."trace_qgis"
SELECT ST_3DExtent("geom") FROM "public"."trace_qgis"
BEGIN READ ONLY; DECLARE :cursor_name BINARY CURSOR FOR SELECT st_asbinary("geom",'NDR'), "id", "name"::text, "nullable_text"::text FROM "public"."trace_qgis"
FETCH FORWARD 2000 FROM :cursor_name
CLOSE :cursor_name; COMMIT
